programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Who Is Kim Kardashian West?
programme.desc: Kim Kardashian West, arguably the most famous woman in the world, changed the face of social media. See how a reality TV star parlay her massive following into a billion-dollar business.

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Does Hip-Hop Reject Women?
programme.desc: The history of hip hop has often been told through the eyes of the men who dominate the charts. But badass female rappers have been battling for equality since the beginning.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Khloe plans a baby shower for her best friend, Malika wrestles with the reality of becoming a single parent. Kourtney gets into cuddling and breakouts of her comfort zoom by forcing herself to be more affectionate.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris, Puppies and Pranks
programme.desc: As concerns begin to grow over the Coronavirus, Kim and Kourtney head to Paris for the Yeezy season 8 launch. Kris and Corey welcome a new puppy, and Khloé and Scott’s prank on Kris continues taking yet another turn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Journey to Healing
programme.desc: Scott experiences some troubling health issues and Kim heads to Washington to meet with some formerly incarcerated women. Khloe is determined to cure Kim of her fear of spiders.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trouble in Palm Springs
programme.desc: After months of tension among the sisters, Kris plans a getaway to Palm Springs for her daughters to bond, but a major fight between Kendall and Kylie derails the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister, Sister and a Babymoon
programme.desc: Khloe takes her bestie on one last trip before her due date, but worries that some issues with Malika’s baby daddy might send her friend into early labor. The family deals with the fallout of Kendall and Kylie’s big fight in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Things Fall Apart: Covid-19
programme.desc: As L.A. prepares for a potential lockdown, Khloe falls ill and worries that she may have Covid-19. Malika goes into labor and cannot bring her support system to the hospital.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Losing it in Lockdown
programme.desc: Kim struggles to balance work life and mom life in quarantine, while Khloe gets creative to keep herself entertained. The family encourages Kendall and Kylie to reconcile after their argument in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love Lockdown
programme.desc: Khloe feels pressured to make a decision about her romantic future with Tristan. Scott heads to a treatment center to work on his health, but is betrayed when the facility leaks photos of him.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: Celebs: Just Like Us!?
programme.desc: The Osbournes, The Kardashians, Kendra Wilkinson, and Danny Bonaduce reveal the pros and cons of pioneering 'celebreality'. Host Andy Cohen ambushes Kim, Khloe, Kourtney, and Kris on set for behind the scenes stories of their iconic series.

programme.title: Movie: Friday
programme.desc: Two friends must come up with $200, to pay drug dealer Big Worm for marijuana they smoked.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels from the east coast to the southwest in search of regional specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Just Like Yesterday
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits some joints that feel like they've been there forever. In San Diego, an overgrown coffee shop serving chicken and dumplings for 60 years; a bar-turned-restaurant in Chicago's Little Italy, and in Atlanta, a legendary diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: The Memphis Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: While in Memphis, Guy samples pulled pork sandwiches and barbecue spaghetti.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Port to Port
programme.desc: Guy's going from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to Portland, Ore. for righteous coast-to-coast flavor. In Oregon, a Spanish spot serving outrageous octopus and an homage to the chef's childhood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Funky Finds in 'da House
programme.desc: Guy and his son video chat with four DD alums that walk them through one of their recipes. The recipes include a funky waffle from Syracuse, gourmet mac 'n' cheese from Cleveland and California smoked turkey and green chile pork with an island twist.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Chow
programme.desc: Guy's quest is covering the country. In Charleston, S.C., a breakfast hangout does a chicken-fried biscuit and a shrimp BLT. In Chicago, a 40-year-old institution is busting out traditional German specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, CA, a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, MI, the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not What You'd Expect
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers outrageous food at some unlikely joints in Austin, Texas, Minneapolis and Albuquerque.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Snacks, Apps and Twisted Mac
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits an old favorite he's been going to for years in San Francisco, but nowadays it's his buddy who's on the line serving up cod rillettes and chowder with a surprise ingredient.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Authentic to Inventive
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is divin' into dishes from real deal to really creative. In Portland, OR, a 70-year-old icon is serving up authentic recipes from the chef's Chinese hometown, and a jammin' joint in Oklahoma City is getting groovy with chicken and biscuits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homeland Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's celebrating homeland favorites from all kinds of diverse cultures. In Richfield, Minn., the Mexican restaurant-market combo dishing out real-deal tacos al pastor and carnitas tamales.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Mouthfuls
programme.desc: Guy's unhinging his jaw for some mega mouthfuls! In Robbinsville, New Jersey, a real-deal Italian market cookin' up prosciutto bread and their multi-meat 'boss of the sauce'.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Classics
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries out local favourites in New Orleans, Pittsburgh and Albuquerque.

programme.desc: Ina is setting sail down the Hudson River to celebrate a friend's birthday. They're providing the boat and she's bringing fantastic portable food including Hot Smoked Salmon, Fresh Dill Sauce and Carrot Cake.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Jeffrey's Faves
programme.desc: Jaffrey's favourites are in the spotlight as Ina celebrates the food he loves. There's his new Friday night fav, fried chicken sandwiches, perfect to kick start the weekend.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fresh Squeeze of Flavor
programme.desc: We're squeezing out the last drop of the season's star produce: citrus. Geoffrey braises a citrus chicken tagine and Katie lee cooks up a pistachio-crusted cod with citrus salsa. Jeff makes a classic Greek lemon chicken soup while Pati make a lime cake.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Taste Of Capri Party
programme.desc: After a recent trip to Capri, Italy, Giada De Laurentiis hosts a lunch party for her girlfriends that celebrates the island and one of its most inspiring ingredients; the lemon.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Jade's After Party
programme.desc: After Jade's big volleyball game, Giada De Laurentiis invites her daughter's teammates to celebrate at a fun-filled after party.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Sheet Pan Adventures
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is going on a sheet pan adventure, and first up is a roasted sheet pan salad served right in the pan, followed by one big meatloaf. She also makes mega mac and cheese and a jumbo breakfast of her sheet pan pancake with three toppings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Ladd's Birthday
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her family are celebrating Ladd's birthday with his favorite foods for dinner. There's a juicy, rare Filet with Roasted Garlic Butter that Ree pairs with Cheesy Au Gratin Potatoes and a fun cowboy-style Chopped Salad Board.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spring to It!
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts share simple, seasonal dinners for every night of the week, starting with cavatelli with asparagus, lemon and fresh ricotta. There's also a family-friendly easy wedge salad, black sea bass en papillote and magic mousse for dessert.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: A Bowl of Lemons
programme.desc: Guy Fieri gives his friends lemons, and they make anything but lemonade. Eric Greenspan stirs a citrusy Tom Collins, Antonia Lofaso lightens things up with puffy pavlova with lemon curd whipped cream, and Marc Murphy makes fried calamari with lemon aioli.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Celebration Dinner Party
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's chef friends visit the ranch. Alex Guarnaschelli puts a twist on Caesar salad with spicy pancetta and cornbread croutons, and she gives a kick to pineapple upside-down cake.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: West Wild Card Play-In
programme.desc: Tournament of Champions is back. There were so many chefs clamoring to get into the bracket that Guy Fieri expanded the tournament to include two wild card play-in rounds.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: East Wild Card Play-In
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes four of the best chefs from the East to vie for the 8th seed in the East bracket of the main tournament. The four chefs have to battle each other, face the dreaded Randomizer and survive the blind judging.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Some of My Best Friends Are Portuguese
programme.desc: Shut out once again by the judgemental moms at Ritchie's school, Christine runs into a down-to-earth workingwoman, who invites her over for a drink after work. Belinda's job, however, isn't quite the type of position Christine expected her to hold.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Christine volunteers to help out at Richie's spring carnival and while there, she runs into the mean moms, who are clucking over the attractive father of a new student at Westbridge. Christine is excited to learn that the hot dad is her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Passion of the Christine
programme.desc: Since New Christine broke up with Richard, he's been spending a lot of time at Christine's house, leading Ritchie to believe that his parents are back together. Richard suggests that they give their relationship another try.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Answer Is Maybe
programme.desc: Richard tells Christine that the reason he has good luck with women is that he 'says yes to life.' When Christine meets a good-looking man after paying a visit to New Christine, she breaks out of her mold and says yes when he asks her out to dinner.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Come to Papa Jeff
programme.desc: When Christine's parents can't make it to Grandparent's Day at Ritchie's school, New Christine suggests that Jeff, the new man in Christine's life, go as Ritchie's special friend. Christine then learns that Jeff really is a grandfather.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Oh God, Yes
programme.desc: Ritchie returns from a church festival with Richard and new Christine with a newfound interest in religion. Christine, who once had a bad experience at church, re-examines her beliefs and with Ritchie and Matthew in tow, decides to give God another go.

programme.desc: After Darlene begins barking in class, Roseanne is called to the school for a parent/teacher conference.

programme.title: Roseanne: D-I-V-O-R-C-E

programme.title: Roseanne: Language Lessons

programme.title: Roseanne: The Memory Game

programme.title: Roseanne: Here's to Good Friends

programme.title: Roseanne: Nightmare on Oak Street

programme.title: Tanked!: Ty Dolla's Fresh Tank
programme.desc: Hip-hop artist Ty Dolla $ign wants a tank in his house in Long Beach. He calls in Wayde and Brett to construct a huge freshwater tank. Complete with a real rock insert, perfect replicas of Ty's awards, and embedded into a wall.

programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are designing an aquarium for NBA superstar Anthony Davis. ATM has their work cut out for them in order to please the power forward who wants to transform an entire room into an aquarium.

programme.desc: Health expert Dr. Oz wants to add to his family. He already has chickens, bees, a cat, and a dog and wants to add some fresh water fish. This aquarium will include an Oz themed interior that will have the fish swimming down the yellow brick road.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Prank Tank
programme.desc: Ventriloquist Jeff Dunham is left speechless when ATM designs his very own puppet show tank. Later, Wayde and Brett design Jeff Tremaine to build a tank in ode to "Jackass".

programme.desc: A staff member heads to the Marine Mammal Center in California to help in rehabilitation efforts of elephant seals. African penguins Charlie and Lizzie have been together for 25 years, and Charlie is having issues with his eyes. A piranha needs surgery.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Baby Otter Rescue
programme.desc: The team welcomes two rescued southern sea otter pups, Mara and Gibson, from the California coast. Young ruddy ducks arrive at the aquarium and are introduced to their new habitat. Nandi, the aquarium's smallest manta ray, is due for her annual checkup.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dolphin Doctor
programme.desc: Polka, a bottlenose dolphin, has a raspy voice and needs to see the doctor to get the all-clear. Staff excitedly prepare for the upcoming puffin breeding season. Two woebegone sharks are due for a checkup. A curious and active box turtle goes for a walk.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott
programme.desc: Max, a beloved camel, develops a large abscess on the top of his head. An adorable marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal. Later, a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is bought to the zoo for a health check.

programme.title: The Zoo: Otter Under the Weather
programme.desc: Jasmine, a 14 year-old otter, is not her usual, energetic self. The staff of the New York Aquarium undertake a massive operation to move their sharks to a brand new exhibit. And the quirky capercaillies need help producing healthy chicks.

programme.title: Pig Royalty: discovery+ 1st Look: Smells Like Money
programme.desc: Welcome to Helotes, Texas, where competitive pig shows are as big as Friday night football! The reigning champs, The Baleros, and the upstarts, The Rihns, come face-to-face at Dripping Springs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat
programme.desc: A markhor goat gives birth to Andre, the biggest baby of the year. A baby bat requires human care before it can be reintroduced to its colony. Later, confiscated lizards destined for the pet trade require urgent medical attention.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Gaur Move
programme.desc: Keepers introduce three gaur, a large, skittish species of cattle, to the rest of the herd. A sickly Sambar fawn is rushed to the health center. Plus, the bird department excitedly prepares for the arrival of great hornbills.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches
programme.desc: Peaches, a two-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador. A nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit. Plus, Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Kings of Queens
programme.desc: A trio of new penguin chicks are introduced to the pool for their first swim. Family dynamics change when the mandrill monkey troop welcomes a new baby. Plus, a pair of king vultures are prepped for their big debut at the Queens Zoo.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Modern Family Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating the murder of a devoutly religious couple uncover dark family secrets, leading them to a suspect that shocks everyone.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Dying to See You
programme.desc: When a popular college student is found slain in the middle of campus, police suspect his friends and lovers might be involved.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: When Hate Kills
programme.desc: Police in small town Louisiana investigate the mysterious and brutal murder of a beloved neighbor with no known enemies.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Murderer on Main St.
programme.desc: A beloved resident of a tight-knit Nebraska town is brutally murdered, leading detectives to look at a wide range of suspects before the trail leads to a killer who lives among them.

programme.title: Snapped: The Case Continues: Jodi Arias
programme.desc: With Jodi Arias back in the headlines in 2019, we take another look into the media circus surrounding Jodi's sensational trial and question whether that frenzy, along with other claims, could possibly play a part in a new trial for Arias.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: She was beautiful, trusting and troubled. The young woman from a prominent family was just turning it around and realizing her promise. Then she vanished. When the police seemed unable to find her, her family hatched a plan to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Killer Motive: A Healthy Dose of Murder
programme.desc: A popular chiropractor is healthy one day but dies a painful death the next. When doctors discover that the reason for her death is far from natural causes, police must uncover who would want a woman with a seemingly perfect life dead and why.

programme.title: Killer Motive: The Art of Death
programme.desc: Family members desperately search for a missing Virginia teenager, not knowing police have a secret: they’ve discovered his body but refuse to release any info as they untangle an extraordinary motive.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Waking Nightmare
programme.desc: When a wife claims she woke up to discover her husband had been shot to death as she slept next to him – and she didn't see or hear a thing – police are dubious. Is she a shocked and grieving widow, or a cunning killer with a twisted master plan?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Domestic Terror
programme.desc: A Naval officer who rose through the ranks and once questioned terrorists at Guantanamo Bay is found by his wife, dead inside a Florida hotel room. Is the brutal crime connected to his wartime service, or are secrets closer to home to blame?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Deception in the Desert
programme.desc: When a soldier is gunned down on a dusty street in a California desert town, the investigation tests the bonds of friendship – and the limits of family loyalty – as police close in on the killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets of the Snake River
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young mother leads to a massive search across the Pacific Northwest. With an estranged husband, ex-boyfriend and a suspicious neighbour all in the picture, authorities believe there are a few potential suspects.

programme.title: Dateline: A Killing in Cottonwood
programme.desc: Karen Duenas is found dead in her bedroom. The family is convinced a crazed killer is on the loose, but detectives wonder if it could have been something else.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Frank Rodriguez was a Navy vet who dedicated his life to helping needy children, not a guy with many enemies. Figuring out who would want him dead was a challenge. How he died was also a mystery investigators needed to solve to catch his killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While He Was Sleeping
programme.desc: When Eric Somuah was found shot in his bed, it was hard to imagine who would want the outgoing salesman dead. One dogged detective refused to give up. His investigation put him on a path filled with twists, turns and an ending few saw coming.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Marc Despain was a married father of two and a successful real estate appraiser. He was busy building a life, until his ended all too soon. Investigators wondered if money was a motive, or maybe a family rift. His loved ones wanted answers.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Savior or Sinner?
programme.desc: When a North Carolina preacher's wife is found murdered, police must determine not only who may want her dead, but whether some members of the congregation are mourning – or trying to cover up their part in the violent crime.

programme.title: Killer Motive: The Best of Friends
programme.desc: When the body of insurance salesman Brian Davis is found alongside a bayou in Calcasieu Parish, Louisiana, police discover that he is a man with a life full of secrets. But could those closest to him be hiding the biggest secret of all?

programme.title: Killer Motive: The Art of Death
programme.desc: Family members desperately search for a missing Virginia teenager, not knowing police have a secret: they’ve discovered his body but refuse to release any info as they untangle an extraordinary motive.

programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead
programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Temple of Terror
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion rocks the streets in Cambodia and it may be linked to a temple complex. Motorcyclists encounter what may be a legendary humanoid cannibal, and a cursed mineshaft could explain paranormal activity in a town's antique center.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Exorcist Effect
programme.desc: A boy who can twist his head 180 degrees and face directly behind him resembles infamous accounts of demonic possession from horror films; experts use cutting-edge technology to find out what's giving him this extreme ability.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Homicide City: Pine Hill Massacre
programme.desc: When Bill and Catherine Stuart are executed in their home along with their three-year-old daughter, police look to the surviving daughter Miriam for clues. Her description of the killer leads detectives deep into Philadelphia's criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Missing on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A mother's worst nightmare becomes a reality when her 12-year-old son is abducted on Christmas Eve. Detective Waters soon learns this was not the first time the child went missing.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: When a costly mistake allows a criminal to escape justice, John steps in to help investigators in pursuit of felon Lester Eubanks. And Cal looks into the case of William Stanson, a supposed loving father who turned out to be a sexual predator.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Harmony in Polyamory
programme.desc: An open-minded foursome soon discovers there's no harmony in polyamory, and someone will pay the ultimate price for free love.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mandy Stavik: The Case No One Could Forget
programme.desc: Hear how a bakery worker's secret plan to recover DNA from a discarded Coke can helped investigators solve the cold case of a college student murdered over Thanksgiving weekend.

programme.title: Betrayed: Unholy Alliances
programme.desc: Church secretary Dorothy 'Dot' Finelli, 59, goes missing and turns up dead, as police explore if she's killed by a jealous new Internet date or somebody she's known for years within her own family circle.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Harmony in Polyamory
programme.desc: An open-minded foursome soon discovers there's no harmony in polyamory, and someone will pay the ultimate price for free love.

programme.title: American Nightmare: The Answering Machine
programme.desc: When a charitable, up-and-coming actress is savagely murdered in her home, police believe an angry, revenge-hungry killer is responsible. No one could expect the lies, obsessions, and evidence that will be uncovered in this shocking cold case.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Everyone Has a Motive
programme.desc: When John Kowalczyk is shot dead, rumors fly in the quiet town of Vienna, VA. Friends can't imagine who would murder the successful entrepreneur. But as police look into John's inner circle, a web of suspects emerges that has the whole town on edge.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: Twisted Confession
programme.desc: Anna Borntregger has been dead for 10 years, so when her husband suddenly tells police he murdered her they don't know what to make of his confession.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Mennonite Mob
programme.desc: When a Mennonite family man is stopped for drunk-driving, no one could predict that it would expose a shocking underbelly of organized crime. Abraham Wiebe risks it all as a central figure in one of the largest criminal cases in Oklahoma history.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: The Disco Inferno
programme.desc: Chris Paciello is the club king of South Beach, adored by celebrities like Madonna and Sofia Vergara. Yet his perfect world will be shattered if his dark and violent past is revealed.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: The Secret of the Summer Wind
programme.desc: When governor's aide vanishes without a trace, her disappearance sets off an investigation exposing the dark secrets of one of the most powerful men in the state.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Highway of Horrors
programme.desc: In 1992, a college student disappears after her car breaks down on the highway. Family and friends join police in a frantic search that hits one setback after another. It may take new advances in DNA technology to finally crack this stubborn case.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: In Her Own Home
programme.desc: A beautiful college student is found stabbed to death in her bed. Police immediately find the murder weapon and an eyewitness, but the case stalls. And, another beloved young woman is bludgeoned to death in her home.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nail in the Coffin
programme.desc: The promise of peaceful life in Tamarac, Florida is broken when the son of a newly arrived family befriends the neighborhood's most unruly kids. Bad blood between the neighbors boils over until things come to a horrifically violent end on Halloween.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Dead Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: A man who is meticulous about his lawn runs into conflict with a new neighbour who doesn't have the same priorities. The feud between the two men viciously escalates, ultimately ending in an episode of shocking violence.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mailbox Madness
programme.desc: When someone new decides to build his dream home on a quiet street, neighbours take sides. Long-time friends become hard-core enemies, and death is just around the corner.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet the slaying of a young boy. After confronting his own demons brought forth by the tragic case, the detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pretend I'm a Priest
programme.desc: Con artist Fred Brito reinvented himself dozens of times and conducted a symphony orchestra, was elected to a public office, and administered mass as a fake catholic priest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape With One Leg
programme.desc: Walter Rhodes and two other suspects were involved in the murder of two cops. Rhodes agrees to testify against the others for a lesser sentence and is eventually released. Shortly afterwards, he violates his parole but refuses to go back.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be a Ladies' Man
programme.desc: David Corbin is a career criminal. After a stint in prison, Corbin launches a crime wave, stealing cars and selling them for a profit. But when a jealous girlfriend rats him out, Corbin is caught and sent to prison where he pulls off a daring escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to be the Black Market Maestro
programme.desc: A 19-year-old's escalating crimes get him arrested. After a jury acquits him for attempted murder, he reverts back to his old ways by robbing wealthy homeowners. The crime-spree launches a countywide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Kill my Step-Dad
programme.desc: When teenager Randy Baggett can't take any more of his abusive stepfather, he gets help from a friend and they beat and choke him to death. Two years later, Randy gets locked up, but he escapes twice, keeping police and detectives on their toes.

programme.desc: Scott Burnside hires a hit man to kill a friend's wife. But when the hit goes wrong, and four people are found murdered, Burnside flees to a remote island. On the run, Scott is unable to adjust to his lonely life. His family ties tip the Feds.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Dumped

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall

programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Ron Funches
programme.desc: Ron Funches has a new healthy lifestyle, but he's willing to make an exception for Wendy's spicy chicken sandwich. The three chefs try to replicate the sandwich to his liking.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Joel McHale
programme.desc: Three chefs tackle the recreation of the Chicago red hot, then head to the remix round where they'll put a haute cuisine spin on the hot dog classic. Only one chef will walk away with the Championship trophy, and Joel's love and approval.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer
programme.desc: French fries are the topic of competition in a food court. The gang then starts trouble in a Burger restaurant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Meet and Greet
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Back in Time
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael revisits a spirits-drinking spirit, a living fossil, rewrites history again and more with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Back Again Boxes
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Locked Booth
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 5
programme.desc: A hung-over hang-glider, several BMX klutzes, and a naked motorcycle stunt guy who gets road rash in the worst possible place.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 6
programme.desc: An alligator trainer who's almost alligator lunch, a clumsy cliff diver, and an amateur stunt man who will probably never go pro.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 7
programme.desc: Thrill seekers are captured in their less than fine moments, from flying cars to bikes with two bicyclists.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 8
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme
programme.desc: The chefs are asked to replicate the deep-fried chicken of KFC for Steve Lemee and Kevin Heffernan, the stars of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tells Terry to find the author of an anonymous firefighter blog from the station and shut it down. With everyone a suspect, no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.desc: Two cousins move in together and work as nighttime security guards. Their house is robbed on Christmas Eve and they team up to track the criminal down.

programme.desc: Hilarity ensues when two wildly different men swap bodies and must then cope with their new lives.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a fun-loving guy impregnates an up-and-coming entertainment journalist, they put their differences aside and take a shot at love.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: A Tuscan Feast: Joel McHale and Cheryl Hines
programme.desc: Lisa creates an al fresco Tuscan feast for two hilarious guests: Italian-born Joel McHale and actress Cheryl Hines. The day includes a mystery blindfold game, flaming cheese pasta, and Lisa confronting Joel about things he's said about her in the past.

programme.title: Overserved with Lisa Vanderpump: An Evening in Provence: Lance Bass and Vivica A. Fox
programme.desc: Lisa transports her best friend Lance Bass and actress Vivica A. Fox to the South of France with a Provence-themed party — and serial prankster Lance gets a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family First
programme.desc: The girls recreate a legendary family video as part of Kris's epic 60th birthday bash. Meanwhile Khloé struggles to find a balance between supporting Lamar and returning to her daily life. Kendall worries that her family will get in the way of her dreams.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unforeseen Future
programme.desc: With her due date rapidly approaching and her baby breached, Kim learns that her house construction is delayed even further.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Beginnings and Endings
programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: Knocked Up

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: The Bracket Begins
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes the final 16 chefs into the Tournament of Champions arena and reveals the new and returning chefs' seeds and matchups.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Seafood and Shawarma
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's taking an eclectic, global-infused tour of Flavortown. In Minneapolis, an Italian spot carries on a fun, family pizza-making tradition, and in Miami, a champion chef cooks Haitian classics like griot, snapper and octopus.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen
programme.desc: Guy hits the road to grab grub straight from mom's kitchen. In Boulder, a mother and son team serve Chinese specialties, a Jamaican joint dishes out island favourites in Columbus and a Phoenix family spot cooks Latin cuisine.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East-West Flavorfest
programme.desc: Washington D.C. serves dumplings and ramen. Atlantic City has a pizza parlor with cheeseburger and chicken vodka pizza. Also, roast beef and cinnamon rolls in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Latin Street Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are dancing as he digs into all kinds of Latin favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Paprikash
programme.desc: Guy finds a diner spicing, roasting and smoking fresh pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Goin' Big and Bringin' Home
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri combine cooking at home and great restaurant food with recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. The menu includes a stromboli from Wyoming and seafood stew from a classic Georgia diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecued, Baked and Brined
programme.desc: Guy visits three joints doing scratch cooking their way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bringing Comfort Home
programme.desc: On today's menu, there's gourmet grilled cheese from Nashville, primo pizza from Boulder, Colorado, Memphis fried chicken and Greek kebabs out of Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Only at This Joint
programme.desc: A BBQ place in Portland serving smoking trout and Oysters Rockefeller in Florida.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Seeing Double
programme.desc: Trisha celebrates her wax figure being inducted into Nashville's Madame Tussauds Wax Museum. The menu includes ingredients that are used in at least two ways, including Pork Tenderloin with Bacon Onion Jam and Apple Cider and Sautéed Apple Basmati rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Gal's Best Friend
programme.desc: To celebrate the adoption anniversary of her dog, Millie, Trisha Yearwood makes a healthy lunch with her friend, Lisa, before taking their dogs on a hike.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Celebrating 20 Years of Friendship
programme.desc: Valerie invites her three best friends over to celebrate two decades of friendship with hot spinach and crab dip, grilled eggplant parm, warm Brussels sprout salad, apricot Manhattans and a cream cheese cherry galette.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: All-American Boy
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli's close friend and fellow chef, Stuart O'Keeffe, recently became a US citizen, so she's treating him to her favorite all-American dishes. The patriotic menu includes red wine and herb-marinated tri-tip and twice-baked potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Girls' Night In
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is hosting a girls' night at the lodge, complete with a tasty spread of canapes and cocktails. She makes citrus shrimp nachos and zucchini quinoa cakes with herbed yogurt.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Moving House
programme.desc: There's a new cowboy on the ranch, and Ree Drummond is making him dinner to-go and sharing the epic story of delivering his massive, ready-built house.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Vacation at Home
programme.desc: Ree Drummond goes global for delicious inspiration while staying cozy in her kitchen. She crosses the Atlantic for an all-in-one take on a Full English Breakfast and heads to North Africa for a Chicken Tagine. Dessert is a trio of Brazilian Brigadeiros.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Just for Two
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making recipes just for two. For sharing, there's a juicy Cajun t-bone steak with lemon pepper shoestring fries. She also makes a sheet pan dinner of spicy peanut chicken and broccoli, plus dulce de leche lava cakes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Passover
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is celebrating day two of Passover on the farm with her super crispy giant skillet latke for lunch. For dinner, succulent spatchcock roast chicken is served with mouthwatering schmaltzy potatoes and green goddess sauce.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Spring Is Springing!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh creates a springtime feast to celebrate planting season on the farm. The meal includes her juicy one-skillet chicken with spring vegetables, crispy dill flakey bread, and a nutty walnut romesco sauce for dunking.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sister Supper
programme.desc: Kardea Brown gets her sisters together for a special Southern dinner. The scrumptious menu includes fried pork chops with homemade table gravy and rainbow rice pilaf. For dessert, Kardea bakes up a treat that all the sisters love, red velvet sheet cake.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Mom's Birthday
programme.desc: Kardea Brown celebrates her mom's big day with her mom's favorite Tex-Mex meal. The stars of this birthday menu are Carne Asada Chimichangas and an extra-special Brown Butter Cake with a Mexican Hot Chocolate Ganache.

programme.title: The Kitchen: High Roller Steakhouse Dinner at Home!
programme.desc: The hosts cook decadent, delicious dishes inspired by Las Vegas. Jeff and Katie make an over-the-top surf n' turf, Geoffrey shows how to make an impressive tableside Caesar salad and Alex makes a fiery dessert.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Alaskan Alliance
programme.desc: The five food truck teams are tested as they go deep-sea fishing in order to earn their seed money from Tyler Florence. The Alaskan elements are taking their toll not just on the teams but also on the trucks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fusion of Flavors
programme.desc: In Chicago, a saucy spot mashes up Latin and Asian, putting a unique spin on paella and posole. A comfort food joint in Seattle fires things up with Nashville hot chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tri-Continent Cuisine
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out killer cuisine spanning three different continents. In Denver, a unique quick service spot dishes out a creative take on Indian curry. Then in northwest Denver, a Brazilian bistro cooks up the bomb croquettes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Poutine, Pizza and Pork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri travels the country diving into some meaty masterpieces starting at a spot in Longmont, Colorado, that serves craft beer and primo pub grub like their piled-high poutine burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mama's Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy visits a dive in Oklahoma serving wings and waffles and a Polish joint in L.A.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: Stephanie Bruner, mother and professional dancer went missing in the Colorado Mountains. With three viable suspects in mind, her complicated love triangle may have sealed her fate.

programme.title: Dateline: The Prussian Blue Mystery
programme.desc: When a San Diego woman arrives at an emergency room, she is near death. Her hair is falling out and her vital signs are fading, even though there are no signs of an infection or injury.

programme.title: Dateline: Facing the Music
programme.desc: When a young school teacher in Pennsylvania is murdered, her friends wonder if the killer will be caught. Following years without an arrest, investigators discover a new tool that may finally help unlock the murderer’s identity.

programme.title: Dateline: She Didn't Come Home
programme.desc: A mother in Pennsylvania disappears one afternoon after she is last seen by her co-workers leaving for lunch. The case remains cold even after 60 investigators try to crack it.

programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.desc: 21-year-old Kelsie Schelling, newly pregnant, has vanished while visiting her on-again-off-again boyfriend. Her mother's desperate search leads to a disturbing connection with another mother miles away.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Nose Job Murder
programme.desc: A young lawyer fails to show up for a blind date. He's been shot to death in his apartment. And another woman freely admits she pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Candymen
programme.desc: The George Brothers grew up privileged, but had no respect for authority. In Florida's pill-mill epidemic of the late 2000s, the Georges rose to millionaire status, only to crash amidst a chaos of overdoses, arrests and a tragic train accident.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Fatal Fraternity
programme.desc: Identical twins Wasel and Wael Ali were obsessed with power from an early age. Using false identities they torment unsuspecting people until they become victims of their own game. These twins share more than DNA, they share the same deadly fate.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Other Modesto Girl
programme.desc: The world knows about Laci Peterson and Chandra Levy, but what about the 'other' Modesto girl, Dena Raley-McCluskey, whose sudden disappearance was no less shocking - and mysterious.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: A young college student embarks on a secret affair with a police officer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer Cougars
programme.desc: Some women can't resist bad boys, but when the fur flies, these women reveal their deadly side.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Schooled in Murder
programme.desc: A lunch break devolves into a nightmare for two school secretaries who disappear in broad daylight. One woman is found dead, launching an intense search for her missing friend. As police collect evidence, they suspect the culprit has ties to the school.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Slaying Season
programme.desc: When a single mother of three misses a routine bank run with her sister, panic begins to spread among the family. The family's nightmare becomes a reality when a passerby finds the beloved petite woman brutally assaulted, nude, and frozen in an alley.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: The Millers always thought something was off with their oldest son Steven. But as he slips from strange into sinister, there's no telling how far Steven will go to get his respected New York family's attention.

programme.title: American Monster: Who Am I?
programme.desc: When Dianne Hart and Donnie Rudd begin an affair in a small Chicago suburb, Dianne's kids hope that their mom has found love. But instead it triggers a series of bizarre lies and deceptions that reveal a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: Documenting the life of the money-loving mafia man Joe Colombo, who campaigned against harassment of Italian-Americans in the 1970s.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: John Gotti
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname `Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: John Gotti
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname `Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: John Glenn, Bruce Lee, Harry Truman and Hunter S. Thompson all lived life without boundaries and they all have one thing in common, they're badass Americans.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: It's the final five-round battle of the season to name who's the most Badass. In one corner, George Washington, our first President takes on notorious General Douglas MacArthur and Amelia Earhart takes on boxing legend Jack Johnson.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Past and Present
programme.desc: Many researchers believe we have been visited by otherworldly spacecraft since the dawn of man. Trace the evidence from the history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and through the art of the Renaissance period.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions have provided a wealth of new evidence to UFO researchers from top intelligence, government and scientific witnesses who were sworn to secrecy in life, but couldn't leave this earth without revealing the truth.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.
