programme.desc: The Heelers take a trip to Hammerbarn. Bingo has an idea for a new game. By waving her featherwand she can make objects impossibly heavy. Dad eats Bingo's last chip.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Kermit Levels Up/ Frogs of a Feather
programme.desc: Fozzie's Funny Joke Show gets interrupted after Kermit finds a video game. When a new friend, Carlos the Frog, visits, Fozzie assumes he likes all the same things as Kermit.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly are made honorary Coast Guard pups to keep every pet safe! Zeus' flying disc soars into the yard of a protective guard dog.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Panda Excess/ A Stinky Situation
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must deliver a baby panda so cute that it makes it hard to say goodbye. Later, the fliers have trouble delivering a baby skunk due to its overwhelming smell.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Ultimate Easter Egg Hunt/ A Chewy Challenge
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy’s next delivery, an egg, gets mixed up with the eggs for the Annual Easter Egg Hunt! Pip braves the desert heat with Freddy to deliver a baby camel to nomad parents!

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Fancy Nancy: Nancy Runs Her Own Race/ JoJo Does the Dirty Work
programme.desc: Nancy fears coming in last in the cul-de-sac’s Super Sprint. When Nancy sends JoJo to tell her friends bad news, they wind up madder than if she’d told them herself.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Home on the Range/ Miguel's Compy Conundrum
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puppies and Pandas / Orange You Glad?
programme.desc: The Pugs are on a mission to recreate a video of a panda sneezing in China. Lollie enlists the Pugs to fetch some oranges for Ana's daily orange juice.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Once Upon a Bedtime/ Thunder and Frightening
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy lead JP and Lucky on an adventure to find Lucky's lost bedtime book. Pip and Freddy make a stormy day delivery.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Early Birds/ Prank You Very Much
programme.desc: When a baby rooster won’t stop waking everyone up, Pip and Freddy teach him when it's time to be quiet. Pip and Freddy plan an April Fool's prank for Captain Beakman with the team!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Holi, By Golly! / The Pink City!
programme.desc: Goofy and the gang must take a painting safely across New Delhi to the Museum of Modern Art. The Happy Helpers help Priya take Missy the elephant to her new sanctuary home in Jaipur.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Boomerang/ Fetch That Fish
programme.desc: The pups go to Australia and get a fishy friend.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: Bluey: Favourite Thing / Daddy Dropoff / Sleepytime
programme.desc: The Heelers take turns remembering their favourite thing from the day. It’s Dad’s turn to give the kids breakfast and drop them off at school. Bingo promises to wake up in her own bed.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Super Dupers
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe use their powers to give their friend a confidence boost, but the gesture backfires when he recklessly starts to think he that he has superpowers of his own.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Save the Past Dance
programme.desc: Tired of hearing tales of Hiddenville's legendary mayor, the kids use a time machine to travel back 60 years to disprove the myths.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Looperheroes
programme.desc: The Z-Force gives Max and Phoebe a superhero day off, but when they relive the day over and over again, they must find a way to break the loop.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Thundreth
programme.desc: Nearing their 100th save, Phoebe and Max are determined to make it their best and most memorable one yet. But by ignoring a series of small saves they overlook a super villain plotting revenge on his old rivals Hank and Barb.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Can't Hardly Date
programme.desc: As Sarah and Gideon's crushes on Max and Phoebe escalate, the twins set them up on a date with each other to solve the problem once and for all.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Make It Pop Pop
programme.desc: Nana and Pop Pop Thunderman come to visit, but when Phoebe reveals Colosso is living in their house, Pop Pop's no-tolerance attitude toward supervillains leads him to banish Max and his bunny best friend to the Detention Zone.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: New Recruits
programme.desc: Void Knight’s new general, Boomtower, tries to steal a mysterious Orb from the city museum. When the Rangers struggle to stop him, they get help from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Winning Attitude
programme.desc: Izzy is determined to win a big race with the help of her Special Olympics athlete cousin, Lily. After Lily misses a training session and Izzy rejects more help, her sportsmanship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Grandparent Trap/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karate/ Taco
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Silence of the Luans/ Undercover Mom
programme.desc: With Luan locked in a cell in the basement, who is responsible for the April Fool’s Day pranks this year?/ Mom goes undercover as a student at the high school and becomes BFFs with Leni, Luna and Luan.

programme.title: The Loud House: Zach Attack/ Flying Solo
programme.desc: Eleven year old Lincoln Loud shows you how to survive the chaos of ten sisters.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sound of Silence/ Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-cancelling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night.

programme.title: The Loud House: Really Loud Music
programme.desc: Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound, or try to make something that the whole world will love just to win a song writing contest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Love That Squid
programme.desc: SpongeBob helps Squidward prepare for a date.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Getaway/ Lost and Found
programme.desc: When SpongeBob mistakes an escaped convict for his driving instructor, it's the new teacher who learns a lesson. When Mr. Krabs sends him searching for a missing toy, SpongeBob finds himself lost in the lost and found.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whirlybrains/ MermaidPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad of flying your own brain like a tiny drone. When SpongeBob and Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Deadly Venom
programme.desc: Karai is brainwashed and starts hunting the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtles in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles get whisked through time by apprentice Time Master Renet, and they must all work together to defeat the evil Time Master Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tale of the Yokai
programme.desc: The Turtles are accidentally transported to the past where they cross paths with a familiar ninja clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Attack of the Mega Shredder!
programme.desc: Leo decides to sneak into Shredder's Lair alone only to face the biggest mutant threat yet.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Creeping Doom
programme.desc: After an accident, Donnie finds himself slowly losing his intelligence.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fourfold Trap
programme.desc: The Turtles are baited by an unknown enemy into deadly traps.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Winning Attitude
programme.desc: Izzy is determined to win a big race with the help of her Special Olympics athlete cousin, Lily. After Lily misses a training session and Izzy rejects more help, her sportsmanship is put to the test.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Dinosaur Seen in Sewers!
programme.desc: When Raph makes a new friend in Zog, an alien Triceraton, he may have bitten off more than he can chew.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Clone Babies/ Flying Spiders
programme.desc: Feeling that being Captain Man is too much work for just one person, Ray and Schwoz hatch the perfect plan: clone Ray.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: Henry Danger: A Piñata Full of Death Bugs
programme.desc: When a dangerous piñata ends up at a kid's birthday party, Kid Danger and Captain Man must go undercover and step in before it's too late.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Scream Machine
programme.desc: When Charlotte's invention for The Gizmo Show is accidentally destroyed and then rebuilt, Charlotte worries that the attention she gets could expose Kid Danger and Captain Man's secret identity.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper's enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Green Fingers
programme.desc: After Schwoz creates a disease that accidentally effects Charlotte, Henry, his family, and even Ray, he quarantines them in Henry's house in order to find a cure.

programme.title: Henry Danger: License to Fly
programme.desc: Ray agrees to let Henry fly his helicopter, but it's too much for Ray when he starts to act like a nervous parent. Charlotte, Jasper, and Piper find a cotton candy machine in Junk-N-Stuff and start making cotton candy.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Balloons of Doom
programme.desc: When Dr. Minyak takes the Man Fans hostage, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to find a way to rescue them without Dr. Minyak seeing them move.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Brawl in the Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Double-O Danger
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man attempt to capture Mob Boss Rob Moss by infiltrating his daughter's sweet sixteen birthday party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Scrooge is forced to babysit young Donald and Della as they go on their first adventure to find a powerful artifact, unaware that Bradford is taking on this mission personally.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: The Owl House: Agony of a Witch
programme.desc: On a school field trip to the mysterious Emperor's Castle, Luz strays from the group and into danger.

programme.title: The Owl House: Sense and Insensitivity
programme.desc: When King becomes a bestselling author, he learns a valuable lesson in reading the fine print.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak
programme.desc: Honey Lemon secretly takes art classes at SFIT’s rival, SFAI, and soon finds herself caught in the middle of both schools’ annual Rivalry Week.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Matchmaker/ School Spirit
programme.desc: In an effort to get a better grade on her math test, Star offers to help her teacher Miss Skullnick with her love life but accidentally turns her into a troll. Star sets booby traps to protect the football team.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Blood Moon Ball/ Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: Star accepts her ex-boyfriend Tom's invitation to Demon Prom, but Marco is suspicious of Tom's intentions and crashes the prom to prevent Star from getting her heart broken again.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Friendenemies/ Is Mystery
programme.desc: When Tom vies for Marco's company instead of Star's, Marco becomes suspicious. Later, worried about his tadpoles' futures, Buff Frog investigates the hole in the Mewman force field.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Baby/ Running With Scissors
programme.desc: Star has to show her fairy godmother what she’s learned about magic. Marco abuses the Dimensional Scissors when he discovers their usefulness in accomplishing everyday chores.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Collateral Damage/ Just Friends
programme.desc: Star has to restore Echo Creek High's spirit after the destruction of the Possum Statue; Star doesn't want Jackie to feel like a third wheel.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star on Wheels/ Fetch
programme.desc: When Marco teaches Star how to ride a bike but forgets to tell her about brakes, he teams up with Oskar and Glossaryck to save her. A mysterious stray dog steals Star's wand and refuses give it back.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part One
programme.desc: When the Goblin opens portals to alternate worlds, Spider-Man must team up with alternative versions of himself to stop his archenemy.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Two
programme.desc: Spider-Man's adventures in alternate worlds continue when he meets Spider-Man Noir, a Spider-Man from a black and white retro world. Then, after travelling to a place where all The Avengers are animals, our hero teams up with Spider-Ham!

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Three
programme.desc: In his pursuit of Goblin, Spider-Man teams up with Spider-Knight, a medieval Spider-Man. Spidey also meets Miles Morales, a young Spider-Man from a world where Peter Parker fell in the line of duty!

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: The Spider-Verse: Part Four
programme.desc: Goblin's plan comes to fruition as he and Spdier-Man return to their own reality. To stop Goblin, Spider-Man needs the help of the other Spider-Man he met along his journey, but Electro makes a play against both sides.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Rich Man, Poor Girl

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sight Gag
programme.desc: Doug gives Carrie laser eye surgery for her birthday, but she is left temporarily blinded.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Himmicane
programme.desc: When a hurricane approaches the area, Caroline fears that a big divorce party she's planning for a wealthy couple will get broken up when the unhappy pair get stranded at the dessert bar. Also, Max worries that Randy did break up with her.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask

programme.title: Black-ish: Son of a Pitch

programme.title: Black-ish: Elder. Scam.
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people. Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him.

programme.title: PEOPLE Presents: Harry and Meghan's American Dream
programme.desc: A year after exiting royal life, Prince Harry and Meghan Markle are living the American dream, but also deal with a personal tragedy and tensions with Prince William.

programme.title: Legacies: Long Time, No See
programme.desc: MG finds himself on the outs with the Super Squad after a controversial decision he made comes to light. Hope puts a risky plan in motion regardless of the protentional consequences. Kaleb, Cleo and Alaric join forces when the latest monster shows up.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Cadillac

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Old Man
programme.desc: Jerry, George and Elaine assist senior citizens; Kramer and Newman help an old man.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tinkle Like a Princess
programme.desc: Charlie runs off to Vegas and returns with a new wife, but she's not Chelsea.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Our Perfect Strangers

programme.title: Mom: A Few Thongs and a Hawaiian Funeral
programme.desc: Christy and Jill take Emily to see her biological mother in rehab where they make a surprising discovery, and Bonnie watches Adam's dog while he's out of town.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Private Coach

programme.title: Mom: Kreplach and a Tiny Tush
programme.desc: Christy hosts a family dinner for Violet's hard-to-please future mother-in-law. Also, Bonnie balks when Steve wants to take their relationship to the next level.
